data.title: Day 2 of 11th World FZO Congress in Hainan, China focuses on Digitization and Sustainability for Free Zones.
data.description: The second day of the 11th World FZO Congress in Hainan, China focused on the significance of digitization and sustainability in shaping the future of free zones. Important topics discussed included leveraging technology and environmentally-friendly practices to drive growth and innovation. The event attracted a large audience, with over 500 industry leaders and experts in attendance. Key takeaways from the discussions emphasized the need for free zones to adapt to the rapidly changing global landscape by embracing digital transformation and sustainable strategies.

data.title: Sungrow and ENGIE connect 400MWh in Europe's largest battery storage project in Vilvoorde, Belgium.
data.description: In October 2025, Sungrow, a top PV inverter and energy storage system supplier worldwide, reported the recent grid connection of 400MWh for ENGIE's monumental 200MW/800MWh battery energy storage initiative in Vilvoorde, Belgium. Representing the largest project of its kind in the region, this successful development signifies a major step towards enhancing energy storage capacity.

data.title: Phemex launches Market Confidence Campaign to assist traders during market downturn with global initiative.
data.description: In Samoa's capital city of Apia on October 11, 2025, Phemex, a highly effective cryptocurrency exchange platform, unveiled its Market Confidence Campaign. This worldwide effort aims to provide assistance to traders amidst the ongoing market slump. The campaign comes at a time when the crypto markets are witnessing widespread drops in values across various assets.

data.title: Nasdaq puts Smart Digital Group Limited on hold due to requested info. SEC suspended trading in SDM on Sept 29-Sep 10 with last sale at $1.85.
data.description: On October 11, 2025, the Nasdaq Stock Market (Nasdaq: NDAQ) disclosed a trading halt for Smart Digital Group Limited to obtain further details from the company. The Securities and Exchange Commission had previously imposed a trading suspension on SDM from September 29, 2025, at 4:00:00 AM until October 10, 2025, at 11:59:00 PM. The final sale price of the company's ordinary shares stood at $1.85 during this period.

data.title: Nasdaq halts trading in QMMM Holdings Limited due to SEC trading suspension issue; last sale price at $119.40.
data.description: On October 11, 2025, Nasdaq Stock Market ® (Nasdaq: NDAQ) revealed a trading halt for QMMM Holdings Limited to acquire more data from the company. The Securities and Exchange Commission had previously halted trading in QMMM from September 29, 2025, at 04:00:00 to October 10, 2025, at 23:59:00. The final sale price of the company’s ordinary shares was $119.40.

data.title: Antalpha secures $150 million funding for Aurelion Treasury on NASDAQ, aims to rename PWM to Aurelion Inc. after $100 million private placement and $50 million debt financing. Treasury tied to Tether Gold for resilience and transparency.
data.description: Prestige Wealth Inc.（NASDAQ：PWM）is planning to rename itself as Aurelion Inc.（NASDAQ：AURE）after approval. They are arranging for a $100 million private placement along with a $50 million senior debt financing. Aurelion Treasury, led by Antalpha, will exclusively value in Tether Gold（XAUt）to enhance resilience and transparency.

data.title: Secure Medical launches TelehealthCash, allowing entrepreneurs to create branded telehealth platforms.
data.description: Today in Tempe, Arizona, Secure Medical revealed the launch of TelehealthCash, a white-label system offering entrepreneurs and small businesses access to digital health platforms like eDrugstore.com and OurDoctor.com. This innovative system aims to facilitate telehealth services and is set to create new opportunities in the healthcare sector.

data.title: AI wearables are collecting intimate data, challenging privacy norms. Cryptography may safeguard our privacy.
data.description: Wearable devices powered by artificial intelligence are poised to collect significant amounts of our personal data, despite the illusion of privacy. This includes sensitive information about individuals. However, implementing strong cryptography measures could potentially safeguard our privacy in the face of this data collection.

data.title: Less sedation for ventilator-dependent patients leads to more independent living post-hospitalization. New research highlights tailored treatment approach.
data.description: A recent study by Montefiore Einstein Research, published in The Lancet Respiratory Medicine, highlights the significance of a comprehensive, symptom-targeted treatment approach for critically ill patients. Conducted in Bronx, N.Y., the research underscores the importance of addressing various facets of care to enhance patient outcomes. With over 5 million individuals admitted to Intensive Care Units in the U.S., the findings stress the need for tailored strategies to improve the management of critical conditions.

data.title: PRN Test article on a quick brown fox jumping over a lazy dog's tail in Cleveland; details irrelevant.
data.description: Cleveland, October 11, 2025 - In a recent report, it was revealed that the quick brown fox successfully jumped over the lazy dog's tail. The test conducted by PRN Test showcased the remarkable agility of the fox as it cleared the obstacle. This impressive feat garnered attention as it symbolizes versatility and adaptability in challenging situations. The event, witnessed by a significant number of individuals, highlighted the importance of agility and quick thinking. Stay updated for further information on this extraordinary display of skill and precision.
Six recent global policy updates shook up the crypto world.

data.title: CEO urges investigation into exchanges following $20B liquidations, surpassing previous crashes. #crypto #FTX #regulation
data.description: Kris Marszalek, the CEO of Crypto.com, is calling for regulators to investigate exchanges following a record-breaking $20 billion in liquidations. This amount far exceeds any previous market crash and has surpassed the liquidations seen on FTX.

data.title: BoxLunch partners with MAG.NET to introduce manga collection in Jan 2026 with titles like Frieren, Inuyasha, Ranma ½, Uzumaki.
data.description: A well-known pop culture retailer, BoxLunch, based in Los Angeles, has revealed an exciting collaboration with the Japanese company MAG.NET, which focuses on manga and anime, along with entertainment properties. The partnership is set to kick off in January 2026, featuring a specially curated lineup of products from four beloved manga series: Frieren: Beyond Journey’s End, Inuyasha, Ranma ½, and Uzumaki. This venture signifies BoxLunch's venture into the manga industry, marking it as a strategic move.

data.title: Rogers offers Toronto Blue Jays fans a chance to win 500 ALCS tickets and takeover a section for home games.
data.description: In Toronto on October 11, 2025, the renowned owner of the Toronto Blue Jays, Rogers, announced an exciting opportunity for fans. They have initiated a giveaway where fans have the chance to win a total of 500 free tickets and even have the opportunity to commandeer a section for each home game of the Blue Jays at Rogers Centre during the American League Championship Series (ALCS).

data.title: New Era Cap unveils 2025 WNBA Championship Collection for Las Vegas Aces; partnership with WNBA. Oct. 11, 2025.
data.description: New Era Cap, the official headwear partner of the WNBA, proudly presents its 2025 WNBA Championship Collection. This collection commemorates the recent WNBA championship and features a range of exclusive merchandise. The images of the collection can be viewed through the linked provided. The launch was announced on October 11, 2025, in Buffalo, New York. New Era continues its partnership with the WNBA and showcases its commitment to the sport through this collection. The release comes as a celebration of the event, with a variety of items available for fans to enjoy.

data.title: AI stocks including Oracle are near buy points after market sell-off, focusing on cybersecurity, data analytics, defense.
data.description: Five companies are closely involved in artificial intelligence, focusing on cybersecurity, data analytics, and defense projects. Oracle is leading these companies, which are approaching attractive buying points after a recent market sell-off.

data.title: Bitcoin's price dips to $103K; 3 charts hint at possible uptrend continuation despite flash crash.
data.description: The price of BTC is currently experiencing a moderate decline, which is less severe compared to previous major reversals in the past. This indicates that Bitcoin's upward trend may likely persist.

data.title: C-Ray Therapeutics congratulates Biokin Pharmaceutical on NMPA approval for first proprietary ARC drug [177Lu]-BL-ARC001.
data.description: A company based in Chengdu, China, known as C-Ray Therapeutics (Chengdu) Co.,Ltd, recently celebrated the success of their partner, Biokin Pharmaceutical, for garnering tacit approval from the National Medical Products Administration (NMPA) for their clinical trial application. This achievement marks a significant milestone in their collaboration.

data.title: Nexdata to showcase AI data solutions for autonomous vehicles at ELIV 2025 in Germany. Global leader in innovative data services.
data.description: In Bonn, Germany, on October 11, 2025, Nexdata, a prominent company specializing in AI-powered data solutions, will be presenting its innovative data services tailored for autonomous vehicles and smart transportation networks at the upcoming 2025 Electric & Autonomous Vehicle (ELIV) Conference. This event will provide a platform for Nexdata to exhibit their cutting-edge offerings to an audience of industry professionals, experts, and enthusiasts.

data.title: Rogers launches Dial the Dugout contests for Blue Jays fans to win 500 tickets to each ALCS home game, also offers ticket draws for cheering fans.
data.description: Supporters of the Canadian team have the chance to win a pair of tickets by cheering them on. The lucky winners will be selected through a draw.
